prose:
**Aniline Fukui Reactivity Indices** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied aniline.xyz, used as-is. Partial charges: Mulliken population analysis. SCF converged. **Most electrophilic site:** Atom 3 (C ortho to NH₂), f⁺ = 2.30 (Δf = 2.23, dual descriptor). **Most nucleophilic site:** Atom 1 (N, amino group), f⁻ = 0.20 (Δf = 1.47). Fukui indices computed as finite-difference population changes between neutral (N), cation (N+1, ²⁺ doublet), and anion (N−1, ²⁻ doublet) states. Full Fukui indices array by atom: f⁺ = [1.67, −1.90, 2.30, 2.30, −0.29, −0.29, 1.40, −0.35, −0.35, −0.82, −0.82, −0.34, −0.75, −0.75]; f⁻ = [0.20, −0.004, 0.067, 0.067, 0.008, 0.008, 0.110, 0.082, 0.082, 0.076, 0.076, 0.087, 0.068, 0.068]; f⁰ = [0.94, −0.95, 1.18, 1.18, −0.14, −0.14, 0.76, −0.13, −0.13, −0.37, −0.37, −0.13, −0.34, −0.34]. Integrity check passed: charge conservation verified (sum f⁺ = 1.000, sum f⁻ = 1.000), trustworthy = true. Command: `fukui --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 aniline.xyz`. Plot output: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/argo_claude-haiku-4.5/20260703-190147_aniline_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.</prose>
<parameter name="n_atoms">14
